title: Sacituzumab Govitecan plus Pembrolizumab for Advanced Triple-Negative Breast Cancer.
abstract: Triple-negative breast cancer is an aggressive breast cancer subtype, and there remains an unmet need to improve outcomes in patients with previously untreated, programmed death ligand 1 (PD-L1)-positive, locally advanced unresectable or metastatic triple-negative breast cancer.
trial_name: Sacituzumab Govitecan in Untreated Advanced Triple-Negative Breast Cancer
